_patch_meta.description: Session B completion patch for registry 42 (delight). Sets session_b_status to Session B Complete. Analysis document: WA-42-delight-analysis-20260326.docx (543 paragraphs, 6 parts). 58 working terms analysed. Key families: chaphets (delight-as-will), samach/simchah (commanded rejoicing), gil (exultant joy), ratson (acceptance), anag (luxuriant self-abandonment), shaashuim (Ps 119 delight in the law), chamad (desire and covetousness), eudokeo/eudokia, chairo/chara, sunēdomai (Rom 7:22). Key finding: delight is reciprocal — God delights in people and calls them to delight in him. Sixth consecutive applicator anomaly corrected by OP-001.

operations.description: RECURRING APPLICATOR ANOMALY — sixth consecutive registry (98, 34, 160, 126, 59, 42). update_registry ops in PREANALYSIS patches continue not executing. OP-001 corrects registry 42 directly. Claude Code must resolve immediately — this has now affected every registry this session.

Session B analysis complete for registry 42 (delight). Document: WA-42-delight-analysis-20260326.docx. Working set: 58 terms (34 extracted, 24 extracted_thin | Hebrew 48, Greek 10). 1 volume flag: PH2-042-001 (G0021 agalliao). 1 data error flag: PH2-042-002 (H4100, H0227A — sixth extraction anomaly). Cross-registry notes: H2896A tov overlaps with goodness/creation registries; H2530A chamad connects to desire registry 043.
